subject_matter: Non-payment of INR 3.2 Cr for completed EPC project at Chandrapur; client withheld payment citing alleged performance shortfall
key_developments: Thermax filed claim Aug-2024; XYZ filed counter-claim for LD of INR 85L; both sides submitted written statements; cross-examination of Thermax expert witness completed; XYZ expert witness scheduled for May hearing
risk_assessment: Medium — strong evidence of performance achievement but client has documentary arguments on steam purity parameter

subject_matter: Wrongful termination claim — employee terminated for repeated safety violations; claims termination was discriminatory
key_developments: Employee filed complaint Mar-2025; Thermax submitted disciplinary records and safety violation reports; 3 witness statements from supervisors filed; tribunal directed cross-examination
risk_assessment: Low — strong documentation of safety violations and progressive discipline followed per Standing Orders

subject_matter: Disallowance of R&D expenditure under Section 35(2AB) for FY2023-24; amount INR 4.5 Cr disallowed by AO claiming some expenses are not qualifying R&D
key_developments: Assessment order received Apr-2025 disallowing INR 4.5 Cr; rectification petition rejected; appeal filed Jun-2025 with detailed R&D certification from DSIR; similar issue won by Thermax for FY2021-22
risk_assessment: Low-Medium — precedent in Thermax's favor but ITAT bench composition matters

subject_matter: Supplier claims INR 1.8 Cr for alleged improper rejection of refractory material; Thermax rejected delivery based on failed quality tests
key_developments: Supplier filed suit Nov-2025; Thermax filed written statement with quality test reports from independent lab; supplier seeking to challenge test methodology; court directed both parties to explore mediation
risk_assessment: Low — quality test reports from NABL-accredited lab are strong evidence; supplier's alternative test claims are weak

subject_matter: Show cause for alleged exceedance of PM emission limits at Chinchwad plant on 2 occasions in Aug-2025
key_developments: MPCB issued notice Sep-2025 based on stack monitoring results; Thermax submitted compliance report showing exceedance was during baghouse maintenance (scheduled) and ESP auto-restart; new CEMS data submitted showing compliance
risk_assessment: Low — technical justification strong; CEMS data supports compliance; MPCB inspection post-correction confirmed compliance
